{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20962_1
|class_id=20962
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=To be replenished
|fame=30
|art=15
|fth=15
|civ=17
|tech=13
|ss1=Per 5 {race_equip_short} gained, Snail RUSH +2<br>Bionic Parts owned: 100/100
|ss2=Per 5 {race_equip_short} gained, Snail RUSH +4<br>Bionic Parts owned: 100/100
|ss3=Per 5 {race_equip_short} gained, Snail RUSH +6<br>Bionic Parts owned: 100/100
|ss4=Per 5 {race_equip_short} gained, Snail RUSH +6<br>Bionic Parts owned: 100/100
|ss7=Per 5 {race_equip_short} gained, Snail RUSH +6<br>Bionic Parts owned: 100/100<br> (Awakened)
}}
